---
title: ""
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  error: false
---

```{python}
import decoupler as dc
import scanpy as sc
import pandas as pd
from itables import show
from IPython.display import Markdown

import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
```

```{python}
organism = "mouse"
contrast = ""
```

```{python}
net = dc.op.collectri(organism=organism)
```

```{python}
df = pd.read_csv(f"../results/contrasts/{contrast}.csv",sep=';')
```

```{python}
def prepare_for_ULM(df,name):
    df = df.copy()
    df = df.drop_duplicates('gene_name')
    df = df.set_index('gene_name')
    mat = df[['stat']].T.rename(index={'stat': f'{name}'})
    return df, mat
```


```{python}
deg, mat = prepare_for_ULM(df,contrast)
```


```{python}
tf_acts, tf_pvals = dc.mt.ulm(data=mat, net=net)
```

```{python}
tf_acts_to_show = tf_acts.rename(index={contrast:'Activity'})
tf_pvals_to_show = tf_pvals.rename(index={contrast:'P-value'})
tf_to_show = pd.concat([tf_acts_to_show,tf_pvals_to_show])
```

```{python}
show(tf_to_show.T.sort_values("P-value"))
```

## Top 25 Transcription Factor 

:::panel-tabset
## TY_VS_CY
```{python}
dc.pl.barplot(
    data=tf_acts,
    name=contrast,
    top=25,
    vertical=False,
    figsize=(3, 6)
)
```
:::

## Volcano plot of top 5 TF
Here are higlhyted the genes in each contrast that are directly link to the TF network. The Volcano plot is based on the gene expression level from deseq2 analysis.

```{python}
df = df.set_index('gene_name')
```

```{python}
# Get top 5 TFs by absolute activity
top_tfs = tf_acts.abs().T.sort_values(by=contrast, ascending=False).head(5).index

# Prepare logFCs and pvals once
logFCs = deg[['log2FoldChange']].T.rename(index={'log2FoldChange': f'{contrast}'})
pvals = deg[['padj']].T.rename(index={'padj': f'{contrast}'})
```

::: {.panel-tabset}
```{python}
#| output: asis
for tf in top_tfs:
  display(Markdown(f"## {tf}"))  # Tab title
  dc.pl.volcano(
      data=df,
      x="log2FoldChange",
      y="pvalue",
      name=tf,
      net=net,
      top=10
  )
  plt.show()
  display(Markdown(f"\n"))
```
:::


## Network of top 5 TF


:::{.callout-caution}
The expression is actually a fold change!!
The default graph use the gene expression but here I am using the fold change  of the contrast of interest (as propose in decoupler [decoupler]())
:::

```{python}
#| column: page
dc.pl.network(
    net=net,
    data=mat,
    score=tf_acts,
    sources=top_tfs.tolist(),
    targets=10,
    size_node=15,
    figsize=(7, 6),
    vcenter=True,
    by_abs=True,
    c_pos_w='darkgreen',
    c_neg_w='darkred',
    t_cmap = 'viridis',
    s_cmap = "icefire",
)
```
